use_cases: Interactive product image galleries that display a main image that changes based on hover position
Art portfolio showcases with smooth hover-activated transitions between artwork images
E-commerce product detail pages with multiple product images controlled by mouse movement
Media galleries where users preview multiple images by hovering over different regions
ai_summary: A hover-activated image gallery component that displays a collection of images with smooth transitions on mouse movement and hover states. Features mouse position tracking for interactive behavior and supports customizable image arrays, making it ideal for product showcases, art galleries, and media portfolios.
